# Pearl Machine

Pearl Machine supplies automatic pearl, half pearl and stud attaching machines for garment and textile production.

Website: https://pearlmachine.com
Products: https://pearlmachine.com/en/products
Contact: https://pearlmachine.com/en/contact
Full reference: https://pearlmachine.com/llms-full.txt
Email: sales@pearlmachine.com
Phone: +90 532 557 69 93
Address: İsmetpaşa, 155sk. No:23, 34270 Sultangazi/İstanbul, Türkiye

## Product catalog

- UGR-906-NW: dual-color automatic pearl attaching machine for two pearl colors in the same size.
- UGR-906-NF: four-color automatic pearl attaching machine with 230 mm head size.
- UGR-906-ND-W: pearl and half pearl attaching machine for varied garment designs.
- UGR-NF-D9: computerized pearl design machine compatible with dst and rst design files.

## Technical range

- Standard pearl model speed: 190 pieces per minute.
- Workable pearl size: 4 to 16 mm.
- Power source: 220 volts, 1-phase, 50/60 Hz on standard listed models.
- Contact Pearl Machine for machine selection, delivery details and current quote.
